mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teacher WHERE 1=1
AND teacher_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{teacherNo}, '%')
AND Name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{teacherName}, '%')
AND DeptID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{teacherDept}, '%')
AND Title = #{teacherPosition}

SELECT teacherID, Name,teacher_no,Title FROM teacher WHERE teacherID IN
#{id}
